headline: The Real Engine Behind ServiceNow Stock Is Its Contract Backlog
summary: With the stock beaten down by fears of AI disruption, one number reveals a surprising foundation of long-term customer commitment that the market seems to be overlooking.

headline: 2 Large-Cap Stocks to Target This Week and 1 We Question
summary: Large-cap stocks have the power to shape entire industries thanks to their size and widespread influence. With such vast footprints, however, finding new areas for growth is much harder than for smaller, more agile players.
